question_text: Which of the following sets is/are countable?

options.A: The set of all functions from {1, 2, 3, … , 10} to the set of all rational numbers
options.B: The set of all functions from the set of all natural numbers to {0, 1}
options.C: The set of all integer valued sequences with only finitely many non-zero terms
options.D: The set of all integer valued sequences converging to 1
